updates.title: Careers Day - 19 June, 2026
updates.summary: There will an Careers Day on 19 June, 2026. Charge; K10 per learner. Parents and Guardians are requested and encouraged to start preparing Career Attires according to their their children's career choices.

updates.title: Upcoming Events, Term 2 2026
updates.summary: There will be an Education Tour in August, 2026. The charge is K190 per learner. The actual date will be advised later.
